calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (26 Commonwealth, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Mar-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Nina Herndon.

The sale was confirmed at $1,750,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,565,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Watts.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order
